command:
import asyncio, json, re
from playwright.async_api import async_playwright

async def scrape():
    results = {'page_name': 'difrence food', 'location': 'Oran, Algeria', 'type': 'Fast food restaurant', 'data': {}, 'errors': []}
    async with async_playwright() as p:
        browser = await p.chromium.launch(headless=True)
        ctx = await browser.new_context(user_agent='Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/122.0.0.0 Safari/537.36', locale='fr-FR', viewport={'width':1280,'height':720})
        page = await ctx.new_page()
        # Approach 1: Try direct Facebook page URL
        urls_to_try = ['https://www.facebook.com/difrencefood', 'https://www.facebook.com/difrence.food', 'https://www.facebook.com/Difrencefood', 'https://www.facebook.com/difrence-food']
        for url in urls_to_try:
            try:
                resp = await page.goto(url, timeout=20000, wait_until='domcontentloaded')
                await page.wait_for_timeout(3000)
                html = await page.content()
                title = await page.title()
                # Extract meta tags
                og_title = re.findall(r'<meta[^>]*property="og:title"[^>]*content="([^"]+)"', html)
                og_desc = re.findall(r'<meta[^>]*property="og:description"[^>]*content="([^"]+)"', html)
                og_image = re.findall(r'<meta[^>]*property="og:image"[^>]*content="([^"]+)"', html)
                desc_meta = re.findall(r'<meta[^>]*name="description"[^>]*content="([^"]+)"', html)
                if og_title:
                    results['data']['og_title'] = og_title[0]
                    results['data']['og_description'] = og_desc[0] if og_desc else ''
                    results['data']['og_image'] = og_image[0] if og_image else ''
                    results['data']['description'] = desc_meta[0] if desc_meta else ''
                    results['data']['page_title'] = title
                    results['data']['url_found'] = url
                    results['data']['status_code'] = resp.status if resp else 'N/A'
                    # Try to extract followers/likes from visible text
                    text = await page.inner_text('body')
                    followers = re.findall(r'([\d,.]+[KkMm]?)\s*(?:followers|abonn|متابع)', text)
                    likes = re.findall(r'([\d,.]+[KkMm]?)\s*(?:likes|mention|إعجاب)', text)
                    if followers: results['data']['followers'] = followers[0]
                    if likes: results['data']['likes'] = likes[0]
                    # Extract visible posts text (first 2000 chars)
                    results['data']['visible_text_preview'] = text[:2000]
                    break
                results['data'][f'attempt_{url}'] = {'title': title, 'status': resp.status if resp else 'N/A'}
            except Exception as e:
                results['errors'].append(f'{url}: {str(e)[:100]}')
        # Approach 2: Try Google search for more info
        try:
            await page.goto('https://www.google.com/search?q=difrence+food+oran+facebook', timeout=15000)
            await page.wait_for_timeout(2000)
            google_text = await page.inner_text('body')
            results['data']['google_results'] = google_text[:1500]
        except Exception as e:
            results['errors'].append(f'Google: {str(e)[:100]}')
        # Approach 3: Try mobile Facebook
        try:
            await page.goto('https://m.facebook.com/difrencefood', timeout=15000, wait_until='domcontentloaded')
            await page.wait_for_timeout(3000)
            mhtml = await page.content()
            m_title = re.findall(r'<meta[^>]*property="og:title"[^>]*content="([^"]+)"', mhtml)
            m_desc = re.findall(r'<meta[^>]*property="og:description"[^>]*content="([^"]+)"', mhtml)
            if m_title:
                results['data']['mobile_title'] = m_title[0]
                results['data']['mobile_description'] = m_desc[0] if m_desc else ''
            mtext = await page.inner_text('body')
            results['data']['mobile_text_preview'] = mtext[:1500]
        except Exception as e:
            results['errors'].append(f'Mobile FB: {str(e)[:100]}')
        await browser.close()
    print(json.dumps(results, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2)[:6000])

asyncio.run(scrape())
description: سكريبت Playwright لجلب بيانات صفحة difrence food على فيسبوك
